posts.title: Component-Based Website Refactor
posts.content: Today I edited my personal website to include a blog section. Using json on the back end to handle the posts.

posts.title: Homebrew Weather Radar
posts.content: I want to build my own radar to learn more about electromagnetic waves. It would probably help me learn more about space stuff.

posts.title: This week is stressful
posts.content: Everything from work to school to home has been stressful over the last few days. I have a test on thursday, did not get to finish my homework last night because my family was being a lot, and I freaked out a little. I then needed to do a lot of dishes and some laundry. Feels like I am having to do way too much right now. Then, at work, I am having to deal with a machine that very much does not want to work correctly.
